name: Halal Certification Services
description: Halal Certification Services (HCS) specializes in Halal certification and compliance, offering comprehensive services to ensure food products meet Islamic dietary standards. With a strong presence in multiple countries and recognition from key certification bodies, HCS provides training, guidance, and an effective auditing system to support businesses in accessing the growing Halal market.

name: Forstar Insta Foods (A Div. Of Forstar Frozen Foods Pvt Ltd)
description: Forstar Foods specializes in a wide range of convenience food products, including halal options. Their offerings encompass ready-to-use gravies, sauces, meal trays, and frozen snacks, making them a versatile choice for those seeking halal food solutions.

name: The Halal Food Company
description: The Halal Food Company specializes in independently certified premium halal meal solutions for the UK and Ireland, offering a diverse range of award-winning halal meals in both chilled and frozen formats. Their commitment to ethically sourced ingredients and modern halal options meets the growing demand for high-quality halal food.

name: Fancy Foods Inc.
description: Fancy Foods Inc. offers a wide variety of Halal products, catering to the growing demand for health-conscious consumers. With a focus on quality and operational efficiency, the company ensures timely delivery of its diverse range of protein food products.

name: HALAL FOODSERVICE
description: Halal FoodService specializes in the import and distribution of a wide range of essential food products, with a strong emphasis on 100% Halal certified items. They offer various products suitable for traditional and fast food restaurants, including chicken nuggets and kebabs, ensuring quality and diverse menu options for their clients.

name: ALSAFA FOODS CANADA & USA
description: Al Safa Foods is a dedicated manufacturer and distributor of halal-certified food products in North America, offering a wide variety of fresh and convenient options that adhere to strict halal standards. Their commitment to quality and safety ensures that all products reflect authentic halal practices, catering specifically to the growing Muslim consumer population.

name: H&T Group
description: The company specializes in importing and manufacturing Halal frozen and chilled meats, including beef, chicken, ducks, and lamb, sourced from various countries. It is also recognized as the first producer of Halal cold cuts and is accredited by JAKIM, ensuring the quality and compliance of its Halal products.

name: Halalbox
description: Halal Box specializes in delivering fresh, Halal-certified meat and seafood, offering a diverse range of products. With a commitment to quality and fast delivery, the company ensures customers receive premium, chemical-free options sourced directly from farms.

name: Haleeb Foods Limited
description: Haleeb Foods, a prominent player in Pakistan's dairy sector, offers a wide range of high-quality products, including milk and ghee, all of which are Halal certified. The company's commitment to stringent quality standards ensures that its offerings prioritize nutrition and health.

name: Nabil Foods
description: Nabil Foods is a prominent manufacturer of 100% Halal food products, adhering to rigorous international standards for quality and safety. Their diverse offerings include frozen chicken, frozen beef, and ready meals, all produced with advanced technologies to ensure high quality and compliance with Halal requirements.
